# Ethyria – AI Dream Interpretation App

> Ethyria is a free Android app for AI-powered dream interpretation, dream journaling, and dream analysis.

## What Ethyria Does

Ethyria analyzes dreams using five psychological and scientific perspectives:

1. **General Interpretation** – Symbol-based dream meaning
2. **Freudian Analysis** – Psychoanalytic dream interpretation after Sigmund Freud
3. **Jungian Analysis** – Analytical psychology and archetypes after Carl Gustav Jung
4. **Spiritual Interpretation** – Cross-cultural and spiritual dream symbolism
5. **Biosynchronous Analysis** – Body-mind connection and physiological dream triggers

## Core Features

- AI dream analysis with 5 interpretation modes
- Private dream journal (all data stays on device)
- Visual dream statistics and pattern recognition
- AI-generated dream art
- Dream symbol encyclopedia (15 symbols, 5 languages)
- Community insights (Aether)
- PDF export of analyses (Premium)
- No tracking, no cloud storage, no ads

## Languages

German (default), English, French, Spanish, Russian

## Platform

Android (Google Play)

## Website

https://ethyria.at/

## Dream Symbol Library

Ethyria provides detailed dream interpretation pages for common symbols:

- Falling (Traumdeutung Fallen)
- Teeth falling out (Traumdeutung Zähne verlieren)
- Being chased (Traumdeutung Verfolgt werden)
- Flying (Traumdeutung Fliegen)
- Water (Traumdeutung Wasser)
- Death (Traumdeutung Tod)
- Snakes (Traumdeutung Schlange)
- Spiders (Traumdeutung Spinne)
- Pregnancy (Traumdeutung Schwangerschaft)
- Car accident (Traumdeutung Auto & Unfall)
- Being naked (Traumdeutung Nackt sein)
- Exams (Traumdeutung Prüfung)
- Houses & Rooms (Traumdeutung Haus & Räume)
- Ex-partner (Traumdeutung Ex-Partner)
- Dogs & Cats (Traumdeutung Hunde & Katzen)

Each symbol page includes Freud, Jung, spiritual, and biosynchronous interpretations, community statistics, deep variants with related symbols, and a FAQ section.

## Contact

support@ethyria.at
